title.en: Therefore, Ye Tiancai will be targeted by extra...

content.en:
After all, the extra-dimensional red vine is a low-level extra-dimensional thing, and it is a complete low-level extra-dimensional thing, and the energy contained in it is very terrifying.

The perception of extradimensional creatures must be very keen, so they will notice Ye Tian.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai will be targeted by extradimensional creatures.

If it was before, Ye Tian was really far from being the opponent of any extradimensional creature.

But now, he's not afraid of ordinary extradimensional creatures.

......

"Extradimensional Creature-Black Ancient Snake!"

This is a very common extradimensional creature, not very large, but covered with millions of black scales, each scale is full of extradimensional power, and its defense is absolutely terrifying.

"According to the extra-dimensional knowledge obtained from the transaction, the value of any extra-dimensional creature is very high, and the materials on its body are of great value, for example, the scales of this super-dimensional creature of this black ancient snake can be combined with some extra-dimensional materials to refine a super-dimensional treasure!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Almost all of the super secret treasures are refined, and good materials can refine good super secret treasures.

For example, the boundless sailing ship of the gods of the Sumeru realm is very good, it can cross the 510 void of death, and it is a super dimensional secret treasure in a hurry, and Ye Tian needs it very much.

If you can refine a defensive super dimensional secret treasure, it can definitely increase your life-saving ability, and the offensive super dimensional secret treasure will greatly increase the attack power and greatly improve the strength.

Therefore, the Super Secret Treasure helped him a lot in terms of combat effectiveness.

However, he didn't know anything about refining the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure, and even if he obtained the materials, it would be difficult to refine them.

"Let's deal with the Black Xuan Ancient Snake superdimensional creature in front of you first!"

Ye Tian and the extra-dimensional creature in front of him instantly killed together.

"Super Dimensional Vine Light Thorn!"

Ye Tian held the spear condensed by the power of the extra-dimensional and killed the extra-dimensional creature.

The super-dimensional vine light thorn is an incomparably extra-dimensional technique, which can penetrate everything, and I thought it could penetrate the body of the black ancient snake.

However, the Extradimensional Vine Light Thorn attacked the Black Xuangu Snake's body, colliding with the scales on its body, but only one scale on its body cracked.

"The defense is so powerful!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He is also fighting head-on with an extradimensional creature in the real sense, and he was killed in seconds before, so he can't be counted.

Only now, he realized the horror of extradimensional creatures.

It can be said that if you don't master the power of the extradimensional, you will hardly be able to compete with the extradimensional creatures.

Even if the strength surpasses that of the extradimensional creatures, it is difficult to kill the extradimensional creatures.

Fortunately, Ye Tian fused the extra-dimensional things, and was able to urge the super-dimensional power and exert the super-dimensional technique, otherwise he would not even have the qualifications to shake the super-dimensional creatures.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian and this extra-dimensional creature continued to fight, and their strength was almost equal.

But the vitality of the extra-dimensional creature is too terrifying, although he has fused with extra-dimensional things, his vitality and recovery ability are not as good as this extra-dimensional creature.

The only advantage is that his attack power surpasses that of this extradimensional creature.

Coupled with the fact that the IQ of the super-dimensional creature is not high, Ye Tian relied on the super piercing power of the super-dimensional vine light thorn to attack the same scale again and again, and under the unknown number of attacks, he finally penetrated the scale of the black Xuangu snake with another super-dimensional vine light thorn.

And his body is also because of the many times he has urged extradimensional things, causing his physical body to be seriously eroded by extradimensional power, and it will take a long time to recover before his physical body can recover.

"Broken!"

Of course.

Ye Tian was also hit by the angry blow of the Black Xuangu Snake and was also injured by it.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of falling, and he continued to fight with the Burning Eternal Dao Seed.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian's attacks penetrated the wound (affj) mouth and smashed into the body of the Black Xuangu Snake, and the superdimensional power continued to strangle the inside of the Black Xuangu Snake's body, making its injuries more and more serious.

After a long time. []

Ye Tian only had half of his body left standing on top of the corpse of the Black Xuan Ancient Snake, and the extra-dimensional vine light thorn spear in his hand could no longer be maintained, and it dissipated into extra-dimensional power.

"I didn't expect to kill a weaker extra-dimensional creature, and pay such a heavy price, not only this copy body is almost reimbursed, but even the extra-dimensional thing that has just been fused, the super-dimensional Chilin vine, is seriously consumed, even if you can continue to urge the super-dimensional power in the future, you can't exert much extra-dimensional power, and it will take a long time to recover the super-dimensional Chilin vine!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This is the limitation of extradimensional things, that is, the energy is limited, not endless, a battle can exhaust the power of extradimensionality, and you need to wait for the extradimensional thing to recover before you can continue to fight.

But if you completely comprehend the power of the extra-dimensional, then you don't need to use any extra-dimensional things, you can exert the power of the extra-dimensional at will, and it is endless, and it has something to do with your own energy, your own energy is exhausted, your will is exhausted, and you can't exert the power of the extra-dimensional.

It can even be said that as long as it does not fall, it can urge the power of the extradimensional.

But if you want to fully comprehend the power of the extra-dimensional, it is too difficult, and it is more difficult than fusing extra-dimensional things, I don't know how many times!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian put away the corpse of this extradimensional creature Black Xuangu Snake, and then re-condensed a replica body to replace this replica body.

Since the duplicated bodies are all identical, the extra-dimensional thing Ultra-Dimensional Akalin Vine can be perfectly transferred to the new replica body, but it takes a long time for the extra-dimensional Akalin Vine to recover.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian was going to go out first, and then enter this super dimensional treasure land after recovering.

In this way, Ye Tian temporarily came out of this super dimensional treasure land.

In the following years, Ye Tian used the resources of the Super Dimensional Treasure Land to work hard to refine the Eternal Dao Seed and constantly improve his cultivation.

With the resources of the Transcendent Treasure Land, he could make his Eternal Dao Species break through to the current limit faster, and there were even some Transcendent Treasures that could help condense the Eternal Realm Spirit, which was enough to advance his cultivation to the peak realm of the High Realm God Realm.

......

Taihao Tianzhu Palace.

A group of pinnacle realm gods are meeting here, including the Sumeru realm gods.

"Sumeru Realm God, how many superdimensional treasures have you collected over the years?"

A peak realm god who had been in retreat for a long time asked.

"Yonghao Realm God, there are not a lot of collections, so I relied on that super dimensional treasure to fool a group of high-level realm gods into entering and collected some, but in a short period of time, there will not be many high-level realm gods entering there, and our high-level realm gods of Taihao Tianchao Palace dare not venture in. "

The god of the Sumeru realm said helplessly.
